programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn'T Dead
programme.desc: (M) Inspired by true events; Erica vanishes and then emerges three years later at her own murder trial with a story full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Pool Boy Nightmare
programme.desc: (M) After having a brief affair with her pool boy Adam, Gale ends the relationship. Unable to move on, Adam becomes obsessed and takes revenge by dating her daughter, Becca.

programme.title: Living With My Mother'S Killer
programme.desc: (M) Mara forgives her mother's killer and hires him to work on her property. She soon finds the past isn't over, and her own life may now be at stake.

programme.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
